title: Legal Information
description: Important legal documents and policies for IDEAL TV subscription services in Sint-Maarten.
pageDescription: Important legal information, terms, and policies governing IDEAL TV subscription services. Please review these documents carefully.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: For any legal questions or concerns, please contact us:
contact.legalInquiriesDesc: For questions regarding these legal documents or your subscription:
contact.lastUpdatedDesc: These documents comply with French law and consumer protection regulations. IDEAL TV is registered in Basse-Terre (Guadeloupe) under number 840 102 164.

content.title: General Subscription Terms and Conditions - IDEAL TV Service

sections.heading: 1. Purpose and Service Description
sections.content: The IDEAL TV Service provides ongoing access to television content at the installation address specified during subscription, in exchange for equipment provisioning fees and a monthly subscription fee. The service is marketed exclusively in Sint-Maarten territory and its use is restricted to this territory due to content rights granted to IDEAL TV.

sections.heading: 2. Contract Duration and Renewal
sections.content: The contract is concluded for a fixed term with automatic renewal. IDEAL TV will inform you in writing between 3 months and 1 month before expiration of your right to not renew. You may terminate at contract expiration with 1 month written notice, or immediately after first renewal in case of relocation or household fiscal status change.

sections.heading: 3. Equipment and Responsibilities
sections.content: IDEAL TV equipment is provided to you with ownership transferred to the Client. You are responsible for installation and maintenance of equipment at your property. Any alterations, duplication, or fraudulent use of equipment is prohibited and may result in legal action. You must return equipment within 15 days of contract termination.

sections.heading: 4. Payment Terms and Billing
sections.content: Subscription fees are billed monthly in advance in euros. Billing covers the TV service plan, program options, technical services, and applicable activation or management fees. Invoices are provided electronically via your online User space. Payment is by automatic debit. Late or non-payment may result in service suspension and additional fees.

sections.heading: 5. Service Quality and Guarantees
sections.content: IDEAL TV commits to ensuring permanence, continuity, and quality of the TV Service. If service is inaccessible due to IDEAL TV for more than 2 consecutive days, you are entitled to a refund for the interruption period. IDEAL TV is not liable for interruptions due to satellite issues, weather events, equipment problems, force majeure, or electrical grid failures.

sections.heading: 6. Contract Modifications
sections.content: You may change your TV plan, add or remove options at any time via your User space or IDEAL TV store. Changes require acceptance of an addendum and take effect the first day of the following month. Price increases can only occur at contract renewal with 2 months notice. Prices may be indexed annually based on the INSEE ICHTrev-TS labor cost index.

sections.heading: 7. Termination and Cancellation
sections.content: You may terminate at contract expiration with 1 month written notice sent by registered mail to: Service Commercial IDEAL TV, Gustavia BP411, 97133 Saint-Barthélemy. Free termination is available after first renewal if you relocate or your household fiscal status changes (proof required). Equipment must be returned within 15 days to an IDEAL TV store or to: Service Résiliation IDEAL TV, Gustavia BP411, 97133 Saint-Barthélemy.

sections.heading: 8. Claims and Mediation
sections.content: For any claim, contact IDEAL TV Subscriber Service at 05 90 17 17 17 or by mail to Gustavia BP411, 97133 Saint-Barthélemy. IDEAL TV commits to responding within 30 working days. If unsatisfied with the response, you may contact IDEAL TV Consumer Service or the mediator at AMCE (Association for Mediation of Electronic Communications) via http://www.mediateur-telecom.fr.

sections.heading: 9. Dispute Resolution
sections.content: This contract is governed by French law. Any dispute regarding interpretation, application, or execution will be submitted to territorially competent French courts. IDEAL TV may assign this contract at any time in accordance with legal provisions without reducing your rights.

sections.heading: 1. Withdrawal Period
sections.content: For contracts signed off-premises (as defined by Article L. 221-1 of the French Consumer Code), you have a right of withdrawal within 14 days from the date of signing the contract, without giving any reason.

sections.heading: 2. How to Exercise Withdrawal
sections.content: To exercise your withdrawal right, send the withdrawal form (available at the end of your contract and downloadable from your online User space) either by depositing it at an IDEAL TV store or by registered mail with acknowledgment of receipt to: Service Abonnés IDEAL TV, Gustavia BP411, 97133 Saint-Barthélemy.

sections.heading: 3. Equipment Return
sections.content: If you withdraw within the 14-day period, you must return any equipment provided at contract signing at your own expense, no later than 14 days after notifying your withdrawal. Equipment must be returned to an IDEAL TV store or sent to: Service Abonnés IDEAL TV, Gustavia BP411, 97133 Saint-Barthélemy. The burden of proof of notification lies with you.

sections.heading: 4. Refund Terms
sections.content: IDEAL TV will refund any amounts received within 14 days by bank transfer, with your express consent collected at contract signing. If you requested express service activation before the 14-day period expired, you retain the right to withdraw but must return equipment in new condition and pay any service activation fees incurred.

sections.heading: 1. Data Collection and Legal Basis
sections.content: Personal data requested during subscription is mandatory; without it, the subscription cannot be completed. Data collected by IDEAL TV is protected under French Law No. 78-17 of January 6, 1978 ('informatique et liberté') and the GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation).

sections.heading: 2. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, rectify, and object to the processing of your personal data. To exercise these rights, send a request by mail to: Service Abonnés IDEAL TV, Gustavia BP411, Saint-Barthélemy, or by email to: finance@myidealtv.com. Your request must include your customer ID and equipment serial number, or a proof of identity.

sections.heading: 3. Data Usage and Purpose
sections.content: Data collected by IDEAL TV is used to better understand you and your use of IDEAL TV products in order to improve the product, services, quality of service, and offerings. IDEAL TV may use this data for direct marketing operations, sending you information about similar products or services by any medium, including email.

sections.heading: 4. Data Retention
sections.content: Your data is retained for the duration necessary to accomplish the purposes mentioned above. For contract execution purposes, in accordance with regulations on identification of electronic communications service users (Article L.34-1 of the French Postal and Electronic Communications Code), data may be retained for a maximum of 5 years from the end of the relationship.

sections.heading: 5. Contact Authorities
sections.content: If you believe your Information Technology and Liberties rights are not being respected after IDEAL TV's response within 30 days, you may contact the French Data Protection Authority (CNIL) at: CNIL – 3 place de Fontenoy – TSA 80715 – 75334 Paris cedex 07.

sections.heading: 6. Telephone Solicitation Opt-Out
sections.content: In accordance with Article L.224-27-1 of the French Consumer Code, you have the option to register free of charge on the telephone solicitation opposition list (Bloctel) at https://www.bloctel.gouv.fr or by mail to: Société Opposetel, Service Bloctel, 6 rue Nicolas Siret.

sections.heading: Overview
sections.content: This Contract Summary provides a concise overview of your subscription agreement with IDEAL TV. It is designed to help you quickly understand the key terms and conditions of your service.

sections.heading: Service Provider
sections.content: IDEAL TV, a simplified joint-stock company registered with the Basse-Terre Trade and Companies Register (Guadeloupe) under number 840 102 164.

sections.heading: Main Characteristics
sections.content: The contract establishes a subscription relationship for television services including channel packages, equipment provision, and technical support. The service is subject to availability in your service area.

sections.heading: Price and Payment
sections.content: Monthly subscription fees are determined based on your selected plan and any additional services. Payment is due monthly via the payment method you have authorized. All prices include applicable taxes.

sections.heading: Duration and Termination
sections.content: The contract has no minimum duration unless otherwise specified. You may terminate your subscription at any time with 30 days' notice. Specific termination procedures are detailed in the General Conditions.

sections.heading: Service Description
sections.content: IDEAL TV provides television subscription services including access to various channel packages, on-demand content, and associated equipment. Service availability and features may vary by location and selected plan.

sections.heading: Pricing Structure
sections.content: Subscription fees are charged monthly and vary based on the selected package and any additional services. Equipment rental fees, if applicable, are included in the monthly subscription price. All prices are stated inclusive of applicable taxes.

sections.heading: Installation and Equipment
sections.content: IDEAL TV provides necessary equipment for service access. Installation may be performed by our technicians or self-installed depending on the service type. Equipment remains the property of IDEAL TV and must be returned upon service termination.

sections.heading: Customer Support
sections.content: Technical support and customer service are available through our dedicated support channels. Contact information and support hours are provided in your subscription documentation and on our website.

sections.heading: Service Modifications
sections.content: IDEAL TV reserves the right to modify channel lineups, service features, and pricing with advance notice to subscribers as required by law. You will be notified of any significant changes that may affect your service.
